props.name: Name

schemaBuilder.empty: No fields yet. Add a field to get started.
schemaBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: Question or hint the assistant uses to fill this field

props.agentSessionCategoriesInUse: Categories already used in this agent's conversations cannot be unchecked.

placeholders.name: Enter agent name
placeholders.instructions: Enter instructions for the agent to follow when responding to user input
placeholders.greeting: Optional greeting the agent sends first when a new conversation starts

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.outputJsonSchemaInvalid: Output JSON schema must be a valid JSON object

create.title: New Agent
create.description: An agent can perform specific tasks based on its type and configuration.

typeDialog.title: Agent type
typeDialog.description: Choose the type before configuring your agent.

conversationDialog.title: Create Conversation Agent
conversationDialog.description: Create a new conversation agent for {{projectName}}

extractionDialog.title: Create Extraction Agent
extractionDialog.description: Create a new extraction agent for {{projectName}}

formDialog.title: Create Form Agent
formDialog.description: Create a new form agent for {{projectName}}

conversation.title: Edit Conversation Agent
conversation.description: Edit details for this conversation agent

extraction.title: Edit Extraction Agent
extraction.description: Edit details for this extraction agent

form.title: Edit Form Agent
form.description: Edit details for this form agent

delete.title: Delete Agent
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible.

defaultPromptDialog.title: Instructions
defaultPromptDialog.description: These instructions define the behavior of the agent.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.description: You have unsaved changes that will be lost. Do you want to discard them?

orchestration.emptyDescription: This agent answers directly without delegating to another agent.
orchestration.noAvailableAgents: No other conversation agents are available.

embed.enabledDescription: Allow {{name}} to be embedded on external websites via an iframe.
embed.snippetDescription: Paste this <script> tag before the closing </body> tag on any page where you want the chat widget to appear.
embed.snippetHint: Optional attributes: data-color="#2563eb" (button color), data-locale="fr" (widget language), data-display-mode="drawer" (side panel instead of bubble), data-hint="Need help?" (tooltip shown on load and hover).
embed.allowedOriginsDescription: Comma-separated list of allowed origins (e.g. https://app.example.com). Leave empty to allow all origins.
embed.titleDescription: Title shown in the chat header. Defaults to {{name}} when left empty.
embed.logoUrlDescription: URL of the logo image shown in the chat header.
embed.primaryColorDescription: Primary color used in the chat widget header. Enter a hex value (e.g. #2563eb).
